creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi John,

Thanks for your impressive work on the gnat-aux port.
I've run your update through tinderbox and it appears there are three
extra files in the pkg-plist which are not present in the package.

Could you please have a look at the very end of the following log
and confirm that these 3 entries could be deleted from the pkg-plist?

http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/tinderbox/8.2-FreeBSD/gnat-aux-20111026.log

Thanks again John!

Frederic
